user.title: Connect to SimplyPrint
user.description: Enter your SimplyPrint organisation API key and Company ID. Create an API key under Account → API in the SimplyPrint panel; your Company ID is the number shown in your SimplyPrint API base URL (the part right after the domain).

data_description.company_id: The numeric organisation id from your API base URL.
data_description.base_url: Only change this for self-hosted or enterprise deployments.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate SimplyPrint
reauth_confirm.description: The API key for company {company_id} is no longer valid. Enter a new API key.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key or Company ID.
error.rate_limited: Rate limit reached, please wait a moment and try again.

abort.already_configured: This SimplyPrint company is already configured.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll printer state, in seconds. The API allows 60 requests/min.
data_description.enable_statistics: Adds print-time, filament-usage and job-count sensors (requires the Pro plan).
data_description.statistics_days: Number of days of history to summarise in the statistics sensors.

pause.name: Pause print
pause.description: Pause the active print on one or more SimplyPrint printers.

resume.name: Resume print
resume.description: Resume a paused print on one or more SimplyPrint printers.

cancel.name: Cancel print
cancel.description: Cancel the active print on one or more SimplyPrint printers.

reason.name: Cancel reason
reason.description: Cancel reason id (only used if your account requires one).

return_to_queue.name: Return to queue
return_to_queue.description: Whether to return a cancelled queued print back to the queue.

return_position.name: Return position
return_position.description: Where to place the returned queue item.

clear_bed.name: Clear bed
clear_bed.description: Mark a printer's bed as cleared after a finished print.

success.name: Successful
success.description: Whether the finished print was successful.

rating.name: Rating
rating.description: Optional 1-4 star rating for the print.

send_gcode.name: Send G-code
send_gcode.description: Send raw G-code or a named macro to one or more printers (Print Farm plan).

gcode.name: G-code
gcode.description: A list of G-code commands to run.

macro.name: Macro
macro.description: Name of a predefined macro (e.g. home, extrude, retract).

no_targets.message: No SimplyPrint printers matched the service target.
